---
title: "Data Dictionary"
---

Every column of every clean asset, defined. Generated from the dictionaries each cleaning
script registers via `write_asset()`, so it always matches the data.

::: {.callout-note}
Scaffold. Once assets exist, this page renders `collect_dictionary()` (see `R/document.R`)
as a per-asset table of `column` / `definition`.
:::

```{r}
#| eval: false
source(here::here("R/setup.R")); source(here::here("R/document.R"))
collect_dictionary() |>
  dplyr::group_split(asset) |>
  lapply(\(d) knitr::kable(d[c("column","definition")], caption = d$asset[1]))
```
